commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the README latest-release badge image source from Shields to Badgen while keeping the GitHub latest-release link unchanged.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR changes README badge markup rather than executable Crabbox behavior. The observable check is whether the proposed badge endpoint renders the latest release, which the live curl output confirms.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the PR is already narrow, mergeable, and has no actionable review findings.

target.title: [codex] docs: use reliable release badge
target.body:
## Summary
- Replace the README latest-release badge from Shields GitHub-release endpoint with Badgen.
- Keep the badge linked to the GitHub latest release page.

## Root cause
Shields can render its own GitHub token-pool failure as a gray README badge, even when Crabbox releases are healthy.

## Validation
- `curl -sS -L https://badgen.net/github/release/openclaw/crabbox/stable` returns an SVG for `release: v0.24.0`.
- `git diff --check`
- `scripts/check-docs.sh`
target.author: zozo123
